title: No substitute for AI power

title: OpenAI Releases New Financial Services Tools, Rivaling Anthropic

title: US Prepares Global Licensing Requirements for AI Chip Exports Worldwide
description: The United States is developing comprehensive legislation requiring export licenses for artificial intelligence chips to all global destinations, building upon existing regulations that mandate US approval for all Nvidia and AMD product shipments worldwide, representing a significant expansion of semiconductor export controls.
content: The United States is preparing to implement comprehensive legislation that will require export licenses for artificial intelligence chips shipped to any destination worldwide. This development represents a significant expansion of existing semiconduc... [4732 chars]

title: Senior care startup Sage raises $65M to bring AI
description: America’s senior care system is heading into a demographic squeeze. By the end of the decade, tens of millions more Americans will be over retirement age, and nursing homes and assisted living centers are already struggling to staff enough caregivers. A New York startup thinks artificial intelligence can help close part of that gap. Sage
